ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "employment_rate_3_months" REAL /* Percentage of graduates who accept jobs within three months */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary of graduates in the industry */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary of graduates in the industry */,
  "low_base_salary" REAL /* Lowest base salary of graduates in the industry */,
  "high_base_salary" REAL /* Highest base salary of graduates in the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the industry */,
  "number_of_graduates_employed" INTEGER /* The total number of graduates currently employed in the industry */,
  "number_of_companies" INTEGER /* The number of companies in the industry that have hired graduates */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* The growth rate of employment in the industry over the past year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduates" (
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the graduate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the graduate */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the graduate completed */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the graduate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the graduate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the graduate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the graduate */,
  "current_job_status" TEXT /* The current employment status of the graduate (e.g., employed, unemployed, further education) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the graduate's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduates_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the program in years */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the program started */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* The date when the program ended */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* The type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate, certificate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* The name of the department head */,
  "department_website" TEXT /* The URL of the department's website */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* The phone number for the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* The physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_offers" (
  "job_offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job offer */,
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graduate who received the offer */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the job offer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company offering the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary offered */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "acceptance_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was accepted */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* The location of the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the job responsibilities */,
  "job_requirements" TEXT /* The requirements for the job */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* The status of the job offer (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* The type of offer (e.g., full-time, part-time, internship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_offers_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_offers_graduate_id FOREIGN KEY ("graduate_id") REFERENCES graduates ("graduate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_preferences" (
  "job_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job preference */,
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graduate */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred industry */,
  "target_salary_low" REAL /* Lowest target salary */,
  "target_salary_high" REAL /* Highest target salary */,
  "preferred_location" TEXT /* Preferred location for the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "preferred_industry_reason" TEXT /* The reason why the graduate prefers the industry */,
  "preferred_company_type" TEXT /* The type of company preferred (e.g., startup, established, government) */,
  "preferred_job_function" TEXT /* The preferred job function (e.g., management, technical, sales) */,
  "preferred_work_schedule" TEXT /* The preferred work schedule (e.g., flexible, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_preferences_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_preferences_graduate_id FOREIGN KEY ("graduate_id") REFERENCES graduates ("graduate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graduate */,
  "job_offer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employment ended (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the job (if applicable) */,
  "job_performance_rating" TEXT /* The performance rating of the graduate in the job */,
  "next_job_title" TEXT /* The title of the next job (if applicable) */,
  "next_company_name" TEXT /* The name of the next company (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_job_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_offer_id") REFERENCES job_offers ("job_offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_graduate_id FOREIGN KEY ("graduate_id") REFERENCES graduates ("graduate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, alumni, career services, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
